creator: ports-x11-manpages-may07@oldach.net
text:
Err, frankly, I don't have "a script" but sorted this out manually,
using the usual assortment of sh, sed, sort, etc, followed by a vi-based
cleanup phase. :-)

I admit it might be worthwhile to do this automatically. In that case,
probably catman should be taught to deal with ".so <anothermanpage>"
correctly.
